title: Turn off keyboard shortcuts cheat sheet
excerpt: Whenever I am adding notes or updates and include a question mark, the keyboard shortcuts cheat sheet comes up (because the shortcut is simply typing a question mark). Can the shortcut to pull up the cheat sheet be somet…

posts.author: TierneyM (Tierney)
posts.cookedHtml: Whenever I am adding notes or updates and include a question mark, the keyboard shortcuts cheat sheet comes up (because the shortcut is simply typing a question mark). Can the shortcut to pull up the cheat sheet be something different, so it doesn’t pop up every time we type a question mark in any note? Alternatively, can there be a way to turn it off?
